description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a modern urban style, featuring a short-sleeved t-shirt layered under a padded vest with prominent pockets and graffiti-style writing on the back. He wears slim-fit jogger pants with graphic patches and contrasting panels, paired with low-top sneakers. His arms are covered in tattoos, and he accessorizes with multiple gold chains around his neck. The hairstyle is a short, styled cut with shaved sides and longer hair on top. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, streetwise individual likely to be seen in city environments.
description: A tattooed adult male in urban streetwear, featuring a padded vest, graphic joggers, gold chains, and styled short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded vest, gold chains, tattoos, and graphic joggers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vest's profile, arm tattoos, and jogger details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the graffiti-style writing on the vest and the back design of the joggers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the vest's side, tattoos, and the contrasting jogger panel.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt, padded utility vest, slim-fit jogger pants, layered gold chains
attribute_hairstyle: short styled hair with shaved sides and longer top
